title: Joshua's optimization
description: Our carefully curated modpack includes powerful tools like Sodium, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, and others!
body:
![Minecraft title page with a green text under it saying joshua's optimization.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/46fdcd97d6f486a4bf2ffb70c7a6a4fdc3bda1a9.png)

# Enhance Your Gaming Experience with Our Performance Modpack

Our carefully curated modpack includes powerful tools like **Sodium, ImmediatelyFast, Dynamic FPS, and others** designed specifically to optimize and enhance your game's performance. Enjoy smoother gameplay and improved frame rates with these essential mods!

# Just like the original
There will be absolutely NO content mods added to this modpack; our focus is strictly on optimization. We aim to enhance performance and stability while keeping the existing gameplay intact. Expect improvements that make your experience smoother.

# Made on fabric
Joshua's Optimization uses the Fabric mod loader, which is lightweight, fast, and supports a lot of optimization mods. Thats why we chose it!

# Special thanks to...
ThievishJoke or BaLLducked for the logo! (not the title page, the actual logo)

# Q & A
- How do i report a bug? In our [Github.](https://github.com/Joshua1056/JoshuasModpacks)
